_notes.whisper_model: Options: tiny.en, base.en, small.en, medium.en. base.en is fast + accurate on Apple Silicon.
_notes.voice_id: Find your voice ID at elevenlabs.io/voice-lab or via GET /v1/voices. e.g. 'EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL'
_notes.picovoice_access_key: Free tier at console.picovoice.ai — 3 months unlimited. For custom 'Hey EVA' keyword, generate a .ppn file and set keyword_path.
_notes.keyword_path: Absolute path to .ppn file e.g. /Users/vineet/Eva/modules/voice/hey_eva_mac.ppn. Leave empty to use SpeechRecognition fallback.
_notes.anthropic_api_key: If set here AND not in ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var, this value is used as fallback.
